name: Stir Fried Catfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook hot rice.
2. Cut fillets into 2-inch strips.
3. Combine lemon juice and soy sauce in a bowl; add fish. Let stand for 20 minutes.
4. Add 3 tablespoons oil to a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Heat for 2 minutes.
5. Add red pepper and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Add celery, snow peas, and mushrooms. Stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
7. Remove vegetables and set aside.
8. Drain fish (reserving marinade) and add to the wok. Stir-fry for 2 minutes or until fish flakes easily.
9. Return vegetables to the wok.
10. Combine cornstarch, water, salt, and pepper with reserved marinade in a bowl; stir until smooth.
11. Add the mixture to the wok and cook for another 2 minutes or until slightly thickened.
12. Serve over hot cooked rice. Makes 4 servings.
